name: Renegade Exploration Limited
summary: Renegade Exploration Limited discovers, acquires, explores for, and develops mineral deposits in Australia and Canada. The company explores for zinc and lead deposits. It holds an option to acquire 75% interests in the Yandal East Gold Project covering an area of 352 square kilometers located in Wiluna, Western Australia. The company also holds interests in the Yukon base metal project that includes 1,554 mineral claims covering an area of approximately 305 square kilometers located in the Selwyn Basin. Renegade Exploration Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Subiaco, Australia.
